frontendFiles.summary: Vue 3 page shell that preserves the legacy interaction flow and platform boundaries.
Local state, initial load, primary action handlers, and realtime cleanup.
Typed API client for the primary page use case and platform-aware headers.

backendFiles.summary: Spring Boot controller that replaces MiPlatform endpoint contracts with REST-style endpoints.
Application service boundary for page use cases.
Service implementation that adapts legacy DAO/query semantics into Spring Boot service logic.
Request DTO inferred from the search-form dataset.
Response DTO inferred from the primary result dataset.
Mapper interface for primary page queries and inferred lookup datasets.
Optional MyBatis mapper/XML placeholder when the legacy SQL must be preserved first.

executionSteps: Stage 1: run package analysis and write review overrides if the primary dataset or backend trace is wrong.
Stage 2: lock the primary dataset, primary transaction, platform boundaries, and file blueprint ownership.
Stage 2 deliverable: emit a Vue page config JSON that downstream generation can consume directly.
Stage 2 deliverable: emit a PM-facing test checklist so the page can be validated before signoff.
Stage 3: generate starter files and let AI Pro fill business logic using the starter bundle plus review overrides.
Verification: compare the generated page flow against the original datasets, transactions, and popup/subview flows.
verificationChecks: Primary dataset matches the dominant result grid or primary business response.
Search/code/view-state datasets are not treated as equal peers to the primary result dataset.
Each primary transaction has a resolved or manually corrected backend route chain.
Popup/subview targets are treated as separate related screens, not merged silently into the current page.
No shared platform function is reimplemented locally without explicit approval.

aiPrompts.review: Review page form. Confirm whether primaryDatasetId=ds_scorechk really represents the dominant business result. Distinguish result/search/code/view-state datasets, correct backend traces if needed, and write corrections into the review JSON before stage 2. Validate the stage2 contract for actions Button0_OnClick, Button1_OnClick, Button2_OnClick, search controls 성적조회(Button0, dataset=no dataset); 시험(Combo0, dataset=ds_testCategory, field=testCategory); 과목 담당교수(Button1, dataset=no dataset); 장학금대상(Button2, dataset=no dataset), and related navigation Button1_OnClick -> scurl (subview, params=no parameter bindings); Button2_OnClick -> scholarship (popup, params="param="+Quote(param), 600, 300, AutoSize=false resize=false).
aiPrompts.frontend: Using the stage 1 package, stage 2 plan, and Vue page config for form, implement the frontend files (frontend/src/pages/form/FormPage.vue, frontend/src/composables/useFormPage.ts, frontend/src/api/form.ts). Preserve the interaction pattern grid-page, treat ds_scorechk as the main business result, and keep platform features out of local reimplementation. Build the search area from 성적조회(Button0, dataset=no dataset); 시험(Combo0, dataset=ds_testCategory, field=testCategory); 과목 담당교수(Button1, dataset=no dataset); 장학금대상(Button2, dataset=no dataset). Render the main data grid using Grid0 -> dataset ds_scorechk, headers 학생번호, 학생명, 평균점수, 등수, 석차. Implement action flows 성적조회/Button0_OnClick [button-flow] tx=TX-BUTTON0ONCLICK-1; nav=no navigation; form_OnLoadCompleted/form_OnLoadCompleted [page-load] tx=no transaction; nav=no navigation; 과목 담당교수/Button1_OnClick [button-flow] tx=no transaction; nav=scurl; 장학금대상/Button2_OnClick [button-flow] tx=no transaction; nav=scholarship. Respect validation/state/message rules: validation[Combo0:어떤 시험입니까? 콤보박스에서 확인해주세요] state[Grid0 Enable=True; Grid0 Visible=True; Grid0 TabStop=True] messages[디와이정보기술 2019학년도 성적조회; 성적조회; 시험]. Keep related-screen handling explicit: Button1_OnClick -> scurl (subview, params=no parameter bindings); Button2_OnClick -> scholarship (popup, params="param="+Quote(param), 600, 300, AutoSize=false resize=false).
aiPrompts.backend: Using the stage 1 package, stage 2 plan, and Vue page config for form, implement the backend files (backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/web/FormPageController.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/service/FormPageService.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/service/impl/FormPageServiceImpl.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/dto/FormPageSearchCondition.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/dto/FormPageRow.java, backend/src/main/java/com/example/am/form/mapper/FormPageMapper.java, backend/src/main/resources/mapper/FormPageMapper.xml). Map the legacy route http://127.0.0.1:8080/miplatform/testScoreChk.do through EgovSampleController.selectScoreList. Preserve business behavior, but expose cleaner Spring Boot request/response DTOs. Honor endpoint contracts TX-TESTNAMESELECT-1 url=http://127.0.0.1:8080/miplatform/testNameList.do params=no params variable callback=fnCallback sql=sampleDAO.testNameList; TX-FNCMTR-1 url="svc::" + strController params=params callback=fnCallback sql=sql map unresolved; TX-BUTTON0ONCLICK-1 url=http://127.0.0.1:8080/miplatform/testScoreChk.do params=strParam callback=fnCallback sql=sampleDAO.ScoreChk. Align request parameters, callbacks, and button/onload flows with 성적조회/Button0_OnClick [button-flow] tx=TX-BUTTON0ONCLICK-1; nav=no navigation; form_OnLoadCompleted/form_OnLoadCompleted [page-load] tx=no transaction; nav=no navigation; 과목 담당교수/Button1_OnClick [button-flow] tx=no transaction; nav=scurl; 장학금대상/Button2_OnClick [button-flow] tx=no transaction; nav=scholarship.
